_README: Run:      ccr code        (launches Claude Code through the router)
Switch model live inside a session:  /model provider,model   (e.g. /model anthropic,claude-opus-4-8)
Keys are read from env vars ($VAR). Set them in your shell profile; do NOT hardcode secrets here.
Model id strings below are representative — CONFIRM exact ids in each provider's API docs before use.
Gemini REQUIRES the transformer block (its API is not OpenAI-compatible). Free Gemini keys: only gemini-2.5-flash has quota; gemini-2.5-pro free-tier limit is 0 (needs billing). Verified 2026-06-23.

NVIDIA NIM (build.nvidia.com) is OpenAI-compatible (NO transformer). One nvapi key unlocks 100+ open models. FREE tier ~40 req/min — fine for interactive building, but it THROTTLES high-frequency autonomous loops: keep loop traffic on a paid tier or add backoff. Confirm exact model ids in the build.nvidia.com catalog.
Policy: cheap model writes, frontier model (Claude) reviews. Never route the review/think class away from a strong model. A router silently downgrades quality — keep a review gate.
Underscore keys are ignored by ccr.
